nasb.text: But you disowned the Holy and Righteous One and asked for a murderer to be granted to you,

esv.text: But you denied the Holy and Righteous One, and asked for a murderer to be granted to you,

cnv.text: 你們把那聖者義者拒絕了，反而要求給你們釋放一個殺人犯。

ccb.text: 你们弃绝了那圣洁公义者，竟然要求彼拉多释放一个凶手。

csbs.text: 你们拒绝了神圣、公义的那一位，而要求释放一个杀人犯给你们。
